SELECT sinh(value) * 2 FROM test_sinh WHERE value > 0;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT value, sinh(value) AS sinh_value FROM test_sinh) AS subquery WHERE sinh_value > 0;
SELECT sinh(1 + (SELECT MAX(value) FROM test_sinh)) FROM test_sinh;
SELECT t1.value, sinh(t2.value) FROM test_sinh AS t1 JOIN test_sinh AS t2 ON t1.value < t2.value;
CREATE TABLE another_table (x Float64, y Float64);
SELECT a.x, sinh(a.x) + sinh(b.y) FROM test_sinh AS a JOIN another_table AS b ON a.value < b.x;
